title: stelis deregularis
intro: Stelis deregularis, also known as the "False Orchid," is a type of orchid native to tropical regions, specifically in Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis deregularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage certain types of pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
